name: PharmaBlock Sciences (Nanjing), Inc.
summary: PharmaBlock Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. provides chemistry products and services to pharmaceutical research and development, and commercial production. It offers scaffolds and building blocks; custom synthesis services; and process research and development, as well as manufactures key intermediates and RSMs. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Nanjing, the People's Republic of China.
